description: Build the canonical signing payload for a SmartContract Deploy or Execute. Mirrors /Transaction/Pack but produces the byte stream the node validates for SmartContract transactions (transfer prefix + TBinaryProtocol-serialised SmartContractInvocation, prefixed by a single user-field marker). Mode is inferred from the body: byteCodeObjects (and optional sourceCode) without 'method' -> Deploy; 'method' set -> Execute.

request_deploy.sourceCode:
import com.credits.scapi.v0.SmartContract;

public class BasicCounter extends SmartContract { ... }

response_error.message: Provide 'byteCodeObjects' for Deploy or 'method' for Execute

notes: Client workflow: 1) call Pack; 2) base58.b58decode(transactionPackagedStr) -> raw bytes; 3) ed25519 sign -> 64-byte signature; 4) base58.b58encode(signature); 5) call /SmartContract/Deploy or /Execute with the signature AND the same transactionInnerId. The Deploy target address is derived from blake2s(deployer || inner_id || concat(byteCode)) — the gateway returns it so you can index the new contract immediately.
